name: Taiwan Lantern Festival
traditions: Sky lantern releases in Pingxi; main lantern installations; riddle-solving on lanterns; tangyuan eating; parades.
historicalBackground: Taiwan's Lantern Festival blends traditional Chinese customs with distinctive Taiwanese elements, especially the famous Pingxi sky lantern tradition.
description: Taiwan's dazzling Lantern Festival, where thousands of glowing sky lanterns rise into the night sky over Pingxi.
